title: HeadlessDrop
description: Drop player head after their death
body:
# HeadlessDrop
Configurable plugin for dropping player heads after their deaths.

## Commands:
- ``/headlessdrop reload`` - reload configuration

## Permissions:
- ``headlessdrop.reload`` - reloading the plugin configuration

## Config.yml
```
# Name for the dropped head's name
# Use %player% to insert the player's name
head-name: "%player%'s Head"

# Drop chance percentage (0-100)
drop-chance: 100
```
